title: Holy Enchantments
description: The Holy Enchantments mod introduces powerful enchantments focused on improving combat against monsters. It enhances both offensive and defensive abilities, making players more effective in battles with hostile creatures.
body:
![HolyEnchantments](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ee96dfdf2c24a2e1a8258aae5f5025133a3a60c_0.webp)

The Holy Enchantments mod introduces powerful enchantments focused on improving combat against monsters. It enhances both offensive and defensive abilities, making players more effective in battles with hostile creatures.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Divinge Damage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/73219a4a7f22e6acb12db9cbd85891d15989f3ec.png)

Divine Damage – This enchantment increases damage dealt specifically to monsters or undead creatures, enhancing the player's combat effectiveness against hostile entities. Per level You will get 20 procent more damage (Level 5 = 100 procent Boost)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

![Divinge Protection](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/62a819471b50d19b7b718cd9518108db10641639.png)

Divine Protection – This enchantment reduces damage received from monsters, offering extra defense, particularly against aggressive mobs like zombies, skeletons, etc. You will get 2.5 procent damage reduction so a full set with level 4 is 50 procent Damage Reduction.
